title: Default Settings
relevance_summary: Default value left unchecked leading to fund loss via simple transaction manipulation

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sets default values in critical functions without explicit user input

red_flags: Unchanged default value in critical function
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that sets default values in critical functions without explicit user input
summary: Veil Cash and FoomCash lost funds due to an unchanged default value in a critical function. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for default values being set in critical functions.
